title: Bright Future Engineering Scholarship
majorOffered: Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering
description: A merit-based scholarship for high-performing students entering engineering programs with strong academic records and community involvement.
benefits: Full Scholarship (Tuition + Living Costs), monthly stipend, and academic mentoring.
applicationProcess: Submit transcript, personal statement, and recommendation letter through the online portal.

title: ASEAN Graduate Research Grant
majorOffered: Data Science, Computer Science, Information Systems
description: Supports graduate students working on applied research projects with a clear regional impact.
benefits: Partial Scholarship (Tuition Only) with research funding for approved projects.
applicationProcess: Upload research proposal, CV, and supervisor endorsement.

title: Global Leaders MBA Award
description: Designed for future business leaders who want a high-impact MBA with leadership training and industry exposure.
benefits: Stipend, career coaching, and access to international networking events.
applicationProcess: Complete the scholarship form, essay questions, and interview stage.

title: Private Sector Innovation Scholarship
majorOffered: Software Engineering, UX Design, Product Design
description: A private scholarship for creative students building products, services, and digital experiences.
benefits: Partial Scholarship (Tuition Only) plus internship placement support.
applicationProcess: Submit portfolio, short video introduction, and school record.

title: Doctoral STEM Fellowship
description: A competitive fellowship supporting doctoral candidates in advanced STEM fields with strong publication potential.
benefits: Research Funding, conference allowance, and laboratory support.
applicationProcess: Provide research abstract, publication list, and faculty references.

title: Community Service Scholarship
description: For students with a history of community service who want to study fields focused on social impact.
benefits: Full Scholarship (Tuition + Living Costs) and a monthly stipend.
applicationProcess: Submit volunteer log, essay, and academic transcript.
